personalInfo.name: Aditya Yadav
personalInfo.title: Full-Stack Developer
personalInfo.summary: Dedicated Computer Science student with hands-on project experience designing and building innovative technologies in distributed computing environments. Proficient in Computer Science fundamentals including Object-Oriented Design (OOD), algorithm design, and complexity analysis. Proven ability to create scalable, fault-tolerant solutions for large-scale distributed systems, including microservices and RESTful APIs. Adept at handling broadly defined problems and delivering high-quality software in an agile environment.

highlights: Solved 260+ problems on LeetCode (160 Easy, 95 Medium, 9 Hard) demonstrating strong problem-solving consistency and algorithmic thinking.
Maintained active coding streak with 195+ active days and a maximum streak of 33 days on LeetCode.
Achieved LeetCode contest rating of 1464 with a global ranking of ~482K and top performance of 56.66%.
Completed 496+ submissions in the past year showcasing consistent practice and iterative optimization.
Solved 54 problems on Codeforces with consistent participation and a maximum streak of 20 days.
Solved 99 problems on GeeksforGeeks with a 27-day POTD streak and 75+ problems completed under daily challenges.
Applied core data structures and algorithms including Arrays, Strings, Hashing, Greedy, Sorting, and Bit Manipulation to solve real-world coding problems.
Strengthened time and space complexity optimization skills through continuous practice and contest participation across platforms.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science
education.institution: Pranveer Singh Institute of Technology, Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh

certifications.name: McKinsey Forward Program
certifications.description: Mastered strategic problem-solving using the Pyramid Principle to disaggregate complex problems; focused on digital fluency, AI-driven mindsets, and professional resilience.

certifications.name: Software Engineering Job Simulation
certifications.description: Designed system architecture using Spring Boot for financial transaction processing and integrated Apache Kafka for real-time event-driven messaging.

certifications.name: Data Analytics Job Simulation
certifications.description: Conducted deep-dive data analysis and forensic technology tasks to identify patterns in enterprise datasets and provide actionable business recommendations.

projects.title: Enterprise Payment Integration Platform
projects.technologies: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Redis Cluster, Kafka, Docker, JWT, Winston
projects.description: Designed and developed a production-grade platform architected for horizontal scaling to handle 1M+ concurrent users. Implemented fault-tolerant asynchronous communication using Apache Kafka for event-driven processing with dead-letter topic handling and retry strategies. Built secure RESTful APIs with stateless design, idempotent processing, and HMAC signature verification for secure webhook handling and high-traffic reliability.

projects.title: Cloud Burst Prediction System
projects.technologies: Python, FastAPI, Redis, Docker, Streamlit, Random Forest, LSTM, Google Earth Engine
projects.description: Created solutions to run predictions on distributed systems by engineering 493 advanced time-series features from satellite imagery and weather records. Developed a production-grade FastAPI REST API with live prediction endpoints, anomaly detection, and Redis caching for low-latency system performance. Designed an automated model retraining pipeline with versioning and a Streamlit dashboard for real-time observability and feature importance visualization.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.technologies: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Framer Motion, Three.js, Joi, JWT
projects.description: Built a modern full-stack application featuring 3D animations and secure RESTful APIs with JWT authentication and Mongoose ODM for database management. Developed a scalable cloud-based architecture for dynamic workload handling, applying system design principles for high reliability and smooth transitions. Implemented backend logic and monitoring workflows with efficient truncation and error-handling to ensure software performance and extensibility.
